title: [Bug]: Should check the range of auto-increment values when altering a column
description:
<!-- A clear and concise description of bug. -->



Oceanbase should check the range of auto-increment values when altering a column, rather than allowing it to be modified into a column type smaller than the auto-increment value.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE table3 (id int NOT NULL, name varchar(255), PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO table3 (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
INSERT INTO table3 (id, name) VALUES (2, NULL);
ALTER TABLE table3 ALTER COLUMN id SET DATA TYPE smallint;
key_bug_features: Check auto-increment value range during column alteration
